name: zig-collections
description: Implementation of some useful data structures in Zig. Inspired by Python's collections module.

releases.body:
## Main changes

* Add support for string keys to DefaultHashMap by @insolor in https://github.com/insolor/zig-collections/pull/39

## What's Changed
* Bump mkdocs-material from 9.6.15 to 9.6.16 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/insolor/zig-collections/pull/12
* Add zig 0.15.1 to the test workflow by @insolor in https://github.com/insolor/zig-collections/pull/13
* Bump mkdocs-material from 9.6.16 to 9.6.18 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/insolor/zig-collections/pull/14
* Bump typing-extensions from 4.14.1 to 4.15.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/insolor/zig-collections/pull/15
* Bump actions/checkout from 4 to 5 in the github-actions group by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/insolor/zig-collections/pull/16
* Add basic support for unmanaged structures as values of DefaultHashMap by @insolor in https://github.com/insolor/zig-collections/pull/17
* Bump actions/setup-python from 5 to 6 in the github-actions group by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/insolor/zig-collections/pull/18
* Bump mkdocs-material from 9.6.18 to 9.6.21 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/insolor/zig-collections/pull/20
* Bump mkdocstrings from 0.30.0 to 0.30.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/insolor/zig-collections/pull/19
* Bump astral-sh/setup-uv from 6 to 7 in the github-actions group by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/insolor/zig-collections/pull/21
* Bump mkdocs-material from 9.6.21 to 9.6.23 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/insolor/zig-collections/pull/22
* Bump mkdocs-git-revision-date-localized-plugin from 1.4.7 to 1.5.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/insolor/zig-collections/pull/23
* Bump actions/checkout from 5 to 6 in the github-actions group by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/insolor/zig-collections/pull/26
* Bump mkdocs-material from 9.6.23 to 9.7.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/insolor/zig-collections/pull/24
* Try to build docs on pull requests by @insolor in https://github.com/insolor/zig-collections/pull/27
* Bump mkdocstrings from 0.30.1 to 1.0.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/insolor/zig-collections/pull/25
* Bump mkdocs-material from 9.7.0 to 9.7.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/insolor/zig-collections/pull/28
* Bump mkdocstrings from 1.0.0 to 1.0.2 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/insolor/zig-collections/pull/29
* Bump mkdocs-git-revision-date-localized-plugin from 1.5.0 to 1.5.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/insolor/zig-collections/pull/30
* Bump pymdown-extensions from 10.16 to 10.16.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/insolor/zig-collections/pull/32
* Bump urllib3 from 2.5.0 to 2.6.3 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/insolor/zig-collections/pull/31
* Bump mkdocstrings from 1.0.2 to 1.0.3 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/insolor/zig-collections/pull/33
* Bump mkdocs-material from 9.7.1 to 9.7.3 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/insolor/zig-collections/pull/34
* Bump requests from 2.32.4 to 2.33.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/insolor/zig-collections/pull/35
* Bump mkdocs-material from 9.7.3 to 9.7.6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/insolor/zig-collections/pull/37
* Add zig 0.16.0 to tests by @insolor in https://github.com/insolor/zig-collections/pull/38
* Fix get_version.py script name, add dry run for draft-release by @insolor in https://github.com/insolor/zig-collections/pull/40


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/insolor/zig-collections/compare/0.0.2....0.0.3

## What's Changed
* `Counter` and `DefaultHashMap` implemented by @insolor

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/insolor/zig-collections/commits/0.0.2

owner_bio: Backend software developer. Founder of the Dwarf Fortress localization project.
